name: Caramel-Topped Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine apples and water in a saucepan. Cover and steam for about 3 minutes.
2. Drain the apples and spread them on a cookie sheet to cool quickly.
3. Arrange the apple slices in a 9 or 10 inch pie plate.
4. In a separate bowl, combine sugar, flour, cinnamon, nutmeg, pecans, graham cracker crumbs, salt, and melted butter or margarine. Sprinkle this mixture over the apples.
5. Bake at 425°F for 10 minutes. Then reduce the heat to 350°F and bake for an additional 20 minutes.
6. While the pie is baking, combine caramels and hot milk in a double boiler. Cook until the caramels are melted.
7. Pour the hot caramel sauce over the top of the pie.
8. Continue baking for an additional 10 minutes.
9. Allow the pie to cool before serving.
